top_signals.title: Canada wants Saab early-warning aircraft under push to retool defense suppliers
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney has pledged to diversify and localize defense production following continued threats by U.S. President Trump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dell shares jump 28% after server maker reports fastest sales growth since return to public market in 2018
top_signals.summary: Dell has gone from being a sleepy legacy tech company to a high-growth AI story, assembling servers packed with graphics processing units.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Gap shares tumble 14% as retailer cuts sales guidance after disappointing Old Navy performance
top_signals.summary: Gap issued mixed results as sales at its largest brand, Old Navy, fell short of estimates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
